meta.title: Atomic Habits — Personal Growth OS
meta.description: Daily missions, streaks, and visible progress for self-improvement.

footer.tagline: Build habits that stick — one mission, one streak, one level at a time.

language.label: Language
language.modalDescription: Select your preferred language for the site.

nav.promo: Atomic Habits — your personal growth workspace.

hero.title: Meet your daily streak.
hero.subtitle: Track missions, level up with XP, and keep your habits alive — English, fitness, coding, and more.

features.title: Keep work moving 24/7
features.subtitle: Daily missions across categories — one workspace for your growth.

english.title: Learn English
english.description: Daily vocabulary drills and a mini quiz to keep your streak alive.

exercise.title: Exercise
exercise.description: Log a 20-minute workout check-in and earn progress toward your goals.

deepWork.title: Deep work
deepWork.description: Finish a ticket or coding session and stack meaningful wins.

assistants.title: Ask your on-demand assistants
assistants.description: Daily English challenges powered by your streak data — coaches that know your habits and nudge you at the right time.
assistants.chatReply: Great! Let's start: what does "resilient" mean in your own words?

highlights.english: Vocabulary quizzes tailored to your level
highlights.work: Break down tickets into doable daily steps
highlights.fitness: Quick workout prompts when streak is at risk

together.title: Bring all your work together
together.subtitle: Streaks, XP, and reports in one place — see how far you've come at a glance.

heatmap.title: Heatmap
heatmap.description: See your consistency at a glance — every green square is a day you showed up.

xp.title: XP & levels
xp.description: Gamification that keeps you going — level up as habits compound.

reports.title: Weekly reports
reports.description: 82% consistency last week — reflect, adjust, and improve.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Say hello — we're listening
contact.subtitle:
Questions, feedback, or partnership ideas? 

 Send us a message and we'll get back to you.
contact.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.nameMax: Name must be 100 characters or less
validation.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters
validation.messageMax: Message must be 2000 characters or less
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Sign up with email and password to start tracking missions.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
errors.verifyFailed: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back, {{email}}. Your default missions are ready.

designSystem.title: Dark theme · Spotify Green
designSystem.intro: Reference implementation for DESIGN.md. Spotify palette in src/design-system/tokens/.

palette.title: Palette
palette.description: Spotify Green on charcoal surfaces. Token names follow DESIGN.md.

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: DM Sans (SpotifyMixUI substitute). Negative tracking on display sizes per DESIGN.md.
typography.headline: Headline
typography.caption: Caption — meta, status

buttons.title: Buttons
buttons.description: 8px corners (rounded-md). Pills reserved for pricing tabs only.

cards.title: Cards
cards.description: Surface ladder + hairline borders. Product screenshot panels use rounded-xl.
cards.testimonialQuote: The streak system keeps me coming back every single day.

forms.title: Forms
forms.description: surface-1 inputs, 8px radius, primary focus ring at 50% opacity.
forms.name: Name

spacing.title: Spacing
spacing.description: 4px base unit. Section gaps use spacing.section (96px).
spacing.layoutCardPadding: card padding: lg (24px) · testimonial: xl (32px) · cta: xxl (48px)

elevation.title: Elevation
elevation.description: Depth via surface ladder + hairline borders. No drop shadows on dark.

responsive.title: Responsive
responsive.description: Card grids collapse 3 → 2 → 1. Display type scales down on mobile.
